details.description:
Myspace Exclusive!
One bedroom + Home office available with separate living room and kitchen in 1920s elevator prewar with live-in super.
Queen sized bedroom Full sized bedroom MASSIVE living room space Stainless steel kitchen
Fabulous location just steps from Montrose L / Flushing JMZ trains and surrounded by tons of great bars, restaurants; shopping. Short commute to Manhattan!
April 1 move in No broker fee Heat; hot water included Small pets welcome

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Spacious, classic style 2 bedroom apartment in Williamsburg - just around the corner from the Marcy JMZ and Bedford L trains.
The apartment features: Hardwood floors Exposed brick Queen size bedrooms Large living space and separate renovated kitchen.
Heat and hot water is included and pets are welcome. Very well kept building with live-in super. Surrounded by the best local bars, restaurants, cafes, and a short commute to Manhattan!
SMALL pets welcome 4/1 move in

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Live next to the action in this 2 bedroom apartment located in prime downtown Bushwick! Stunning unit in a very convenient location and borderline East Williamsburg. Only 1 block away from the L Jefferson for a reduced commute, and next to Bushwick?s popular restaurants: Cafe Ghia, Bunna Cafe, Mominette Bistro! Laundry in building for your convenience; pet friendly building too!
Butcher block island separates kitchen from living room. See Video! (if you can?t see it check streeteasy or message and I?ll send it) These are 2 king sized bedrooms on opposite sides of the apartment with large closets! Amazing skyline views from the roof as well Just 1st and security to move in No fee
Message to see this right away!

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1-; 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio; panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus; Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops; F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Modern 1 Bed / 1 Bath at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious 1-bedroom features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Luxury Waterfront Living at 44 Kent
Experience modern living on the northern Brooklyn waterfront. This luxury building offers a finished rooftop with sweeping views of Manhattan and the Williamsburg Bridge.
Amenities include a fitness center, business center, bike storage, and optional parking. Inside, each unit features condo-quality finishes: central air, dishwasher, beautiful hardwood floors, designer windows, and more.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Modern waterfront building in Greenpoint with a finished rooftop offering sweeping views of the Manhattan skyline and the Williamsburg Bridge.
Building amenities include a fitness center, bike storage, business center, and available parking.
Residences feature central air, dishwashers, hardwood floors, large windows, and contemporary finishes.
Photos shown are of similar units in the building.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Modern Studio at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious Studio features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

amenities.other: Dishwasher
Hardwood Floors, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C

details.description:

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Central A/C

details.description:
Welcome to 1326 Ocean Ave Studios ? 1-Bed ? 2-Bed Apartments in Prime Midwood / Ditmas Park
Spacious, well-designed residences featuring high ceilings, large kitchens with dishwashers, and excellent closet space. Select units offer private balconies, and all layouts are designed to comfortably accommodate modern living.
Apartment Features
High ceilings
Large kitchens
Dishwasher
Queen-size bedroom layouts
Ample closet space
Private balconies (select units)
Building Amenities
Gym
Rooftop
Lounge
Game room
Bike storage
Laundry room
Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

amenities.other: A/C, Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher

details.description: Luxury, brand-new 2br/2bth in the heart of Brooklyn with abundant natural light and in-unit washer/dryer, plus amenities including a gym, bike room, package room, parking, roof deck, and co-working space.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description: Massive two bed King size bedroom Huge living room Quite block in Downtown Brooklyn Beautiful well kept building W/D in unt Gym (coming soon) Roof Elevator Bike storage Trash chute

amenities.other: A/C, Above "8" ceilings, Abundance of natural light, Closet in every bedroom, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
Prime Crown Heights Living at 1499 Bedford Ave!
HPD income requirements: 2 person min income $144,074 Max income $168,480. 3 person min income $144,074 Max income $189,540. 4 person min income $144,074 Max income $210,600. 5 person min income $144,074 Max income $227,500.? If the household consists of 2 or more household members, they either need to be family-related or provide proof of financial interdependence- E.g. joint lease, tax return, bank statements etc
Discover the epitome of modern living at 1499 Bedford Ave, a new building in the heart of Crown Heights. Located steps from Eastern Parkway and multiple subway lines, and within walking distance of Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn Botanical Gardens, and Prospect Park, this residence offers unparalleled convenience and vibrant city life.
Building Amenities:
State-of-the-art fitness room Pet wash station Laundry facilities (in-unit laundry in some units) Social lounge with game room Furnished rooftop with panoramic city views Second-floor public terrace Open workstations Dedicated mail room
Unit Features: Private terraces and balconies in select units Kitchen islands in select units Large windows with abundant natural light Stunning views of NYC skyline, Prospect Park, and neighborhood streets
Welcome to 1499 Bedford Ave?where luxury, community, and convenience meet. Experience the best of Crown Heights living.

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace

details.description:
Welcome to the brand new luxury building located in the charming Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO! Indulge in breathtaking views of both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Explore the numerous nearby parks, including John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park, and many more! Treat yourself to the delightful offerings of local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee, and for those late-night cravings, you'll find beloved spots like Shake Shack just a few blocks away. This residence combines the classic essence of old-school Brooklyn with the allure of modern luxury living, making it the perfect place to call home.
Convenience is key, as the building is situated near the A, C, and F train lines, as well as the B57, B62, and B69 bus routes.
Unit features include:
Hardwood floors Stainless steel kitchen appliances Dishwasher and microwave Central air conditioning and heating Private balconies (inquire for availability) In-unit laundry (inquire for availability)
Building amenities encompass: Courtyard Roof deck Elevator Laundry room Fitness center Recreation room Tenant lounge Package room Bike storage Pet-friendly accommodations To secure your new home, all you need is the first month's rent and a security deposit. Best of all, there is no broker fee involved!
Experience the epitome of luxury living in a prime location. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity!

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING nestled in the vibrant Greenpoint neighborhood!!
APARTMENT FEATURES: Gleaming Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Appliances Central Air Conditioning; Heating Inquire about the availability of Private Balconies
BUILDING AMENITIES: Rooftop Deck with Stunning Views Elevator for Convenience On-Site Laundry Rooms State-of-the-Art Fitness Center Recreational Room Comfortable Tenant Lounge Package Room for Deliveries Bike Storage Parking available($300 monthly) Pet-Friendly Environment First; Security - NO BROKER FEE.
Conveniently located near L train at Lorimer and right next to McCarren Park.

amenities.other: Central A/C, Hardwood Floors

details.description:
This building is arguably THE MOST desirable neighborhood in Brooklyn. Right on the Williamsburg Waterfront with gorgeous river and city views, all the restaurants, coffee shops, bars, art and music venues, plant shops, parks, farmers markets, grocers, and absolutely anything and everything else you could desire right outside your door. Be warned: the luxury experience you are offered inside the building may leave you feeling torn about whether to go out and enjoy the bustle of the neighborhood or stay in and enjoy your own amenities right here at home!Conveniently located off the J. M, and L trains, as well as the B32, B62, and Q59 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher Central A/C and Heat Private Balcony Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Bike Room Courtyard Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Finished Roof Deck First; Security NO FEE

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Private Outdoor Space, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING in the beautiful Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO!! Enjoy unbelievable views across both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Visit the countless parks nearby such as John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park and even more! Become a patron of some of the long standing and delicious LOCAL local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee and still enjoy those late night cravings spots we pretend we don't know and love (*cough Shake Shack) just a few blocks further. Take a little old school Brooklyn, mix in some new luxury living, and that's how you'll end up falling in love with your new home here!
Conveniently located off the A, C and F trains as well as the B57, B62, B69 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher; Microwave Central A/C; Heat Inquire for Private Balconies! Inquire for IN UNIT laundry!
BUILDING FEATURES: Courtyard Roof Deck Elevator Laundry Room Fitness Center Rec Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Bike Storage Pets Allowed
First; Security NO BROKER FEE!

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space

details.description:
Welcome to 31-19 37th Street, a contemporary Astoria residence that blends industrial-inspired design with the neighborhood?s historic charm. The building features thoughtfully designed homes with large windows that bring in excellent natural light.
Residents enjoy a collection of modern amenities including an elevator, on-site laundry, a residents? lounge, and a furnished rooftop deck with sweeping views of the Manhattan skyline.
Located in the heart of Astoria, the building is conveniently close to the N/Q trains at Broadway and the R/M at Steinway Street, offering a quick commute to Midtown in about 20 minutes.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Welcome to Casa Hope Williamsburg?s new luxury development!
Sunny units with oversized windows throughout, and gorgeous finishes Steps from the L / G trains, commute to Union Square in only 13 minutes door to door!
Tons of building amenities:
Fitness center Rooftop terrace Business center On-site garage parking Lounge on 7th floor Mini lounge nook to each floor Elevator Bike room Parking garage (additional fee)
The kitchen comes equipped with brand new stainless steel appliances including a dishwasher. Gorgeous well-designed light wood cabinetry, white stone countertops and backsplashes. Modern bathrooms feature a deep soaking spa bathtub, as well as modern vanity with oversized mirror, storage cabinet space and matte black finishes. Other features include oak flooring throughout and generous closet space. Trash Chute to each floor.
Perfect location with an easy commute to the city and tons of restaurants, bars and cafes nearby Short walk from McCarren Park and the Bedford L train area

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Microwave, Refrigerator/oven, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C
